meaning: n.[妞峕鐗涜倽鑿屽睘鐪熻弻
examples: Objective to analyze the chemical ingredients of wild Boletus and observe its genetic toxicity on mice.
Try the speciality of the house, the incomparable home-made ravioli, stuffed with boletus, veal or spinach!
Conclusion The wild Boletus is an edible wildlife mushroom with high protein, various mineral elements, and it has no genetic toxicity.
